'''Lurll''' was a [[Wol Cabasshite/Legends|Wol Cabasshite]] [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] who hired hunters to eliminate lairs of creatures on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] where [[Brainworm Rot Type B]] was detected<ref name="SWG:TBRC" /> [[1 ABY/Legends|c. 1 ABY]].<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', missions offered by Ambassador Lurll are found on mission terminals on Tatooine.<ref name="SWG:TBRC" />

==Appearances==
*{{GalaxiesAED}} {{1stm}}
